flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at North Central Missouri College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.0k → $8.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Central Missouri College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.2k → $2.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Central Missouri College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at North Central Missouri College rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 (36.8% → 44.9%).
